title: Add 'Sold Out' flag to wines — form toggle, table indicator, and PDF marker

requirements.summary: Add 'Sold Out' checkbox to the Add/Edit Wine modal form
acceptanceCriteria: The Add/Edit Wine modal displays a 'Sold Out' checkbox or toggle.
The field is pre-populated correctly when editing an existing wine.
Submitting the form with 'Sold Out' checked saves the flag to the backend.
Submitting with it unchecked saves false.

file_operations.description: Add a 'Sold Out' checkbox field to the wine form. Place it near the bottom of the form, before the submit button. Include it in the form state and submission payload. When editing an existing wine, pre-populate the checkbox with the wine's soldOut value. Ensure the field is sent to the backend via addWine or updateWine as defined in the backend interface (backend.d.ts).

requirements.summary: Display 'Sold Out' badge in the wine list table
acceptanceCriteria: Wines marked as sold out display a clearly visible 'Sold Out' badge in the table.
Wines not marked as sold out show no badge.
The badge styling is consistent with the Naturavini brand palette.

file_operations.description: Add a 'Sold Out' badge/label to each wine row where soldOut is true. Display the badge in or near the Wine Name column. Style it as a small pill/tag using the tangerine-orange color from the brand palette (or a muted red). Use consistent spacing and typography. Wines with soldOut = false should show no badge.

requirements.summary: Add 'SOLD OUT' marker to PDF export for sold-out wines
acceptanceCriteria: Wines with soldOut = true show a 'SOLD OUT' marker in their PDF row.
Wines with soldOut = false show no marker.
The marker is visually distinct from regular cell text in the PDF.

file_operations.description: Update the PDF export logic (using jsPDF) to include a 'SOLD OUT' text marker for wines where soldOut is true. Add the marker next to the wine entry (e.g., in parentheses after the wine name or as a separate annotation). Make the marker visually distinct by using bold text, a different color, or special formatting. Wines with soldOut = false should have no marker in the PDF.
